# Data Protection Policy

## 1. Purpose

This policy defines the requirements for protecting sensitive data.

## 2. Scope

This policy applies to all employees, contractors, and third parties.

## 3. Data Classification

### 3.1 Confidential
- Customer PII (names, addresses, SSN)
- Financial records
- Trade secrets

### 3.2 Internal
- Internal memos
- Project plans
- Meeting notes

### 3.3 Public
- Marketing materials
- Published reports

## 4. Access Control

Access to confidential data must follow the principle of least privilege.
All access must be logged and audited quarterly.

## 5. Incident Response

Any suspected data breach must be reported within 24 hours.
The security team will investigate and notify affected parties.
